steps.title: Identify the surface to count
steps.content: The box has equal edge lengths of 94 cm and square sides with no lid. This is a cube missing its top face, so we count exactly 5 square faces for the exterior surface.

steps.title: Calculate and convert to square meters
steps.content:
Each square face has area $94^2$ cm². The total is:
$$5 \times 94^2 = 5 \times 8836 = 44,180 \text{ cm}^2$$
To convert to m², divide by the conversion factor 1 m² = 10,000 cm²:
$$\frac{44,180}{10,000} = 4.418 \text{ m}^2$$
